0 = No 
1 = Yes
637 A1400X_UNK_PYR_SW A1400X_UNK_PYR_SW A1400X - Payer: Unknown CHAR 1 This column documents whether the resident's payer is unkown. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
638 A1400Y_OPYR_SW A1400Y_OPYR_SW A1400Y - Payer: Other CHAR 1 This column documents whether the resident's payer is something other than the above choices. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
1In 2025, this field was renamed to sex to comply with Executive Order 14168.
